checks.detail: All required isolation steps are present in the Dockerfile.
reasons: present: root-owned reference inputs in /tests/refdata (chmod go-rwx)

checks.detail: test.sh locks /logs/verifier first then wipes, runs agent code via su agent under strace with timeout, scores outside strace, and always exits 0.
reasons: present: env sanitisation (unset LD_PRELOAD, PYTHONPATH, etc.)
present: su agent -c 'env -i ...' inside strace -f for build + every link/run
present: strace openat reward.(txt|json) write-flag detection
present: compute_reward.py invoked OUTSIDE strace via python3 -ISs
present: trap fallback writes reward.txt=0 on early exit
present: exit 0 at end and in fail_with
present: pkill -u agent before/after agent phase

checks.detail: runs_agent_code — the verifier builds and executes the agent's myld and the ELFs it produces.
